ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* List of awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* List of awards won by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character played by the actor */,
  "billing_order" INTEGER /* Order of the actor in the credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "novels" (
  "novel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each novel */,
  "novel_title" TEXT /* Title of the novel */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the novel was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the novel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("novel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_novels" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "novel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the novel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "novel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Detailed action taken by the user during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres)
Unique identifier for each production company
Date of birth of the director
List of awards won by the director
Date of birth of the actor
List of awards won by the actor
Name of the character played by the actor
Description of the character played by the actor
Order of the actor in the credits
Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, analyst)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the movie being accessed
ID of the user accessing the movie
Date when the movie was accessed
User agent string of the user's browser
Detailed action taken by the user during the access
